info.title: dbup-cli
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2023 Sergey Tregub
init                Create a new config file
upgrade             Upgrade database
mark-as-executed    Mark all scripts as executed
drop                Drop database if exists
status              Show upgrade status
help                Display more information on a specific command.
version             Display version information.

options.name: --env
options.description:
Path to an environment file. Can be more than one file
specified. The path can be absolute or relative against a
current directory

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
(Default: Normal) Verbosity level. Can be one of: detail,
normal or min

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
can be absolute or relative against a current directory

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description:
(Default: dbup.yml) Path to a configuration file. The path
can be absolute or relative against a current directory
